title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.110 - Such rent, how recovered
text:
441.110.  Such rent, how recovered. — Such double rent shall be recovered in the same manner, at the same time, that the single rent is recoverable.
(RSMo 1939 § 2965) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2579; 1919 § 6875; 1909 § 7878
